# PHIL.052 ? Empiricism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** modern_western
**Subcategory:** empiricism
**Domain:** MODERN_WESTERN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Knowledge through experience; tabula rasa; sensory evidence; inductive method; skepticism of innate ideas

## Application
Ground claims in observation; inductive reasoning; sensory evidence paramount; reject unobservable speculation; experimental verification

## Key Values
- Experience
- Observation
- Induction
- Empirical evidence

## Tags
philosophy, modern-western, empiricism
